mapper.select:
SELECT n.id, n.title, LEFT(n.content, 200) AS content, n.type, n.priority, n.publish_time, n.view_count, CASE WHEN u.id IS NOT NULL THEN '已读' ELSE '未读' END AS status FROM notice n LEFT JOIN user_notice_read u ON n.id = u.notice_id AND u.user_id = #{query.id} AND u.delete_time IS NULL -- 只关联未删除的阅读记录 WHERE n.status = 'published' AND (n.expire_time IS NULL OR n.expire_time >= NOW()) AND (n.publish_time IS NULL OR n.publish_time <= NOW()) -- 关键：排除用户已经软删除的公告 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_notice_read del WHERE del.user_id = #{query.id} AND del.notice_id = n.id AND del.delete_time IS NOT NULL )
AND (n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND n.type = #{query.type}
ORDER BY n.priority DESC, n.publish_time DESC, n.create_time DESC
